change: Extend the split-output Q8T16 pair dispatch to linear-attention attn_qkv+attn_gate projections, using unequal output widths while preserving separate scratch buffers.

hardware.gpu: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 run environment (W7900 not rerun)

correctness_gate.command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_p9_e2e_correctness.py --fixture tests/fixtures/gguf/qwen36_35b_a3b_q4km_p9_e2e.json --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d7_q8t16_qkv_gate_pair_e2e.json

benchmark.command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d7_q8t16_qkv_gate_pair_512x128_bench.json

tests: PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_p9_e2e_correctness.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_fastpath_safety.py -q --tb=short # 45 passed
notes: This reuses the D6 split-output dual Q8T16 kernel; no new HIP symbol was added in this step.
The runtime pair call uses out_features_b for the smaller attn_gate output while keeping the existing linear_qkv and linear_z buffers separate.
This is the largest retained #28 launch-dispatch win so far, but #51/#52/#26 remain open because median decode is still below 95 tok/s.
